description: Perform a data quality check on the diabetes surveillance dataset ('C:\Users\Docker\Documents\DiabetesData\diabetes_surveillance.csv') using the Epi Info 7 Visual Dashboard. Identify the PatientID and erroneous BMI value for the single extreme outlier in a scatter plot of BMI (Y-axis) versus Glucose (X-axis). Save the dashboard to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\DiabetesData\qa_dashboard.canvas7' and create a report containing the PatientID and the erroneous BMI value at 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\DiabetesData\outlier_report.txt'.
